text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Raise the curtains for a glamorous<n>dinner and
opera show hosted by and<n>starring none other
than... me! But<n>could this be a twist of fate?

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Scheduled at the same exact time, the<n>so-called
Golden Generation are<n>holding an event of their
own.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text: I concede the achievements to theirnames... However! I am the truestar!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Observe—I shall captivate the hearts<n>and minds of
the crowd as only the<n>lead role can! So inspired, a
grand<n>feast with my followers ensues.
